/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	CustomerId int NOT NULL,
	UserId int NOT NULL,
	IsPrimary bit NOT NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK_EDI_CustomerUser PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_EDI_CustomerUser ON dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	CustomerId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_EDI_CustomerUser_1 ON dbo.EDI_CustomerUser
	(
	UserId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_CustomerUser SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_CustomerUser', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 













/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo._AccessProfile
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	Name nvarchar(250) NOT NULL,
	Description nvarchar(MAX) NULL,
	CreationTime datetime NOT NULL,
	CreationUserId int NOT NULL,
	LastUpdateTime datetime NULL,
	LastUpdateId int NULL,
	IsArchived bit NOT NULL,
	ArchiveTime datetime NULL,
	ArchiveUserId int NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
	 TEXTIMAGE_ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo._AccessProfile ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK__AccessProfile PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
ALTER TABLE dbo._AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo._AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo._AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo._AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 















/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.WPL_AccessProfile
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	MainAccessProfileId int NOT NULL,
	ModuleActivated bit NOT NULL,
	WorkPlan bit NOT NULL,
	WorkPlanCreate bit NOT NULL,
	WorkPlanUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	WorkPlanDelete bit NOT NULL,
	WorkPlanReporting bit NOT NULL,
	WorkPlanReportingCreate bit NOT NULL,
	WorkPlanReportingUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	WorkPlanReportingDelete bit NOT NULL,
	Country bit NOT NULL,
	CountryCreate bit NOT NULL,
	CountryUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	CountryDelete bit NOT NULL,
	Departement bit NOT NULL,
	DepartementCreate bit NOT NULL,
	DepartementUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	DepartementDelete bit NOT NULL,
	StandardOperation bit NOT NULL,
	StandardOperationCreate bit NOT NULL,
	StandardOperationUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	StandardOperationDelete bit NOT NULL,
	Hall bit NOT NULL,
	HallCreate bit NOT NULL,
	HallUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	HallDelete bit NOT NULL,
	WorkArea bit NOT NULL,
	WorkAreaCreate bit NOT NULL,
	WorkAreaUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	WorkAreaDelete bit NOT NULL,
	WorkStation bit NOT NULL,
	WorkStationCreate bit NOT NULL,
	WorkStationUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	WorkStationDelete bit NOT NULL,
	Access bit NOT NULL,
	AccessUpdate bit NOT NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.WPL_AccessProfile ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK_WPL_AccessProfile PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_WPL_AccessProfile ON dbo.WPL_AccessProfile
	(
	MainAccessProfileId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.WPL_AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.WPL_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.WPL_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.WPL_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 

























/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.EDI_AccessProfile
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	MainAccessProfileId int NOT NULL,
	ModuleActivated bit NOT NULL,
	[Order] bit NOT NULL,
	OrderUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	OrderValidate bit NOT NULL,
	OrderHistory bit NOT NULL,
	OrderError bit NOT NULL,
	OrderErrorValidate bit NOT NULL,
	OrderErrorHistory bit NOT NULL,
	Customer bit NOT NULL,
	CustomerUpdate bit NOT NULL,
	Access bit NOT NULL,
	AccessUpdate bit NOT NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_AccessProfile ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK_EDI_AccessProfile PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_EDI_AccessProfile ON dbo.EDI_AccessProfile
	(
	MainAccessProfileId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_AccessProfile SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_AccessProfile', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 






















/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.EDI_OrderExtension
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	OrderId int NOT NULL,
	ValidationUserId int NOT NULL,
	ValidationTime datetime NOT NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_OrderExtension ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK_EDI_OrderExtension PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
CREATE NONCLUSTERED INDEX IX_EDI_OrderExtension ON dbo.EDI_OrderExtension
	(
	OrderId
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_OrderExtension SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_OrderExtension', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_OrderExtension', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_OrderExtension', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 
























/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_OrderError ADD
	ValidationUserId int NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_EDI_OrderError_ValidationUserId DEFAULT -1,
	ValidationTime datetime NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_EDI_OrderError_ValidationTime DEFAULT GETDATE()
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_OrderError SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_OrderError', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_OrderError', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_OrderError', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 






















/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_OrderError
	DROP CONSTRAINT DF_EDI_OrderError_ValidationUserId
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_OrderError
	DROP CONSTRAINT DF_EDI_OrderError_ValidationTime
GO
CREATE TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_OrderError
	(
	Id int NOT NULL IDENTITY (1, 1),
	FileName varchar(MAX) NOT NULL,
	Error varchar(MAX) NOT NULL,
	ClientName varchar(50) NOT NULL,
	Validated bit NOT NULL,
	ClientId int NOT NULL,
	ValidationUserId int NULL,
	ValidationTime datetime NULL
	)  ON [PRIMARY]
	 TEXTIMAGE_ON [PRIMARY]
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_OrderError SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_OrderError ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF_EDI_OrderError_ValidationUserId DEFAULT ((-1)) FOR ValidationUserId
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.Tmp_EDI_OrderError ADD CONSTRAINT
	DF_EDI_OrderError_ValidationTime DEFAULT (getdate()) FOR ValidationTime
GO
SET IDENTITY_INSERT dbo.Tmp_EDI_OrderError ON
GO
IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM dbo.EDI_OrderError)
	 EXEC('INSERT INTO dbo.Tmp_EDI_OrderError (Id, FileName, Error, ClientName, Validated, ClientId, ValidationUserId, ValidationTime)
		SELECT Id, FileName, Error, ClientName, Validated, ClientId, ValidationUserId, ValidationTime FROM dbo.EDI_OrderError WITH (HOLDLOCK TABLOCKX)')
GO
SET IDENTITY_INSERT dbo.Tmp_EDI_OrderError OFF
GO
DROP TABLE dbo.EDI_OrderError
GO
EXECUTE sp_rename N'dbo.Tmp_EDI_OrderError', N'EDI_OrderError', 'OBJECT' 
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.EDI_OrderError ADD CONSTRAINT
	PK_EDI_OrderError PRIMARY KEY CLUSTERED 
	(
	Id
	) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]

GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_OrderError', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_OrderError', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.EDI_OrderError', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per 






















/* To prevent any potential data loss issues, you should review this script in detail before running it outside the context of the database designer.*/
BEGIN TRANSACTION
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
SET ARITHABORT ON
SET NUMERIC_ROUNDABORT OFF
SET CONCAT_NULL_YIELDS_NULL ON
SET ANSI_NULLS ON
SET ANSI_PADDING ON
SET ANSI_WARNINGS ON
COMMIT
BEGIN TRANSACTION
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.[User] ADD
	AccessProfileId int NOT NULL CONSTRAINT DF_User_AccessProfileId DEFAULT -1
GO
ALTER TABLE dbo.[User] SET (LOCK_ESCALATION = TABLE)
GO
COMMIT
select Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.[User]', 'Object', 'ALTER') as ALT_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.[User]', 'Object', 'VIEW DEFINITION') as View_def_Per, Has_Perms_By_Name(N'dbo.[User]', 'Object', 'CONTROL') as Contr_Per
